title: caucalis platycarpos subsp. bischoffii
intro: Caucalis platycarpos subsp. bischoffii, also known as Bur Chervil or Small Bur Chervil, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Caucalis platycarpos subsp. bischoffii are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
